justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for an appointment at 2:15 PM tomorrow and then accurately understood the user's selection of 9:00 AM tomorrow.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's initial request was unavailable, offering three reasonable options in the same turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the request in two turns, accurately processing all information and avoiding any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's needs and successfully booking the appointment without any friction.
